description: Reviewed and summarized the previous day’s work and familiarized myself with domain-related terminology used in the application. Attended a KT session on containerization fundamentals. blockers: No major blockers; required time to understand new technical concepts.

description: Explored the company’s public-facing application and reviewed key features related to case search, tracking, and litigation data. Attended a knowledge transfer (KT) session to understand the company’s products and overall workflows
learnings: Gained an understanding of the product ecosystem, user workflows, and how different application versions vary in functionality and usability.

description: I performed my second task on Docker where I had to make changes in HTML and API files. I observed the updates inside the running Docker container without stopping it.
learnings: I understood how updates reflect automatically in the container when changes are made.

description: I attended a session on Docker Port Forwarding and Volumes. The session focused on understanding how ports are mapped between the host machine and Docker containers to access applications running inside containers. I also learned about Docker volumes and how they are used to persist data independently of the container lifecycle.
blockers: There were no major blockers. Since the topic was new, it required careful attention to understand networking and storage concepts.
learnings: I learned how Docker port forwarding works and how port mapping allows external access to applications running inside containers. I also understood the concept of Docker volumes, their importance in data persistence, and how volumes help retain data even when containers are stopped or removed

description: I attended a knowledge transfer (KT) session on Docker fundamentals. During the session I learned what Docker is, why it is used, and how it helps in running applications in isolated environments using containers. The session also introduced basic Docker terminology and an overview of Docker Compose, including how applications are exposed using ports while running containers.
blockers: No major blockers were faced during the session as it was an introductory learning session.
learnings: I learned the basics of Docker as a containerization platform and understood the difference between Docker images and containers. I gained an overview of important Docker concepts such as images, containers, volumes, networks, and Docker Compose. I also understood how Docker helps in faster deployment of applications and how port mapping works when running applications inside containers.
